PAM Health to build 42-bed rehab hospital in Minneola, Florida, creating around 80 new jobs.
news.summary: In Enola, Pennsylvania, on February 18, 2025, renowned healthcare provider PAM Health revealed intentions to construct a 42-bed facility specializing in physical medicine and rehabilitation in Minneola, Florida. This venture is expected to generate around 80 employment opportunities for both medical specialists and support personnel.

news.headline: Regrid and Esri collaborate to enhance parcel data with geographic enrichments, revolutionizing location decision-making globally.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, in Detroit, it was reported that parcels play a crucial role in defining property boundaries worldwide, aiding in location decisions. However, they have not been effectively integrated into geographic data, reducing their utility. This issue has prompted Esri, the global leader in GIS technology, to address the problem...

news.headline: PAM Health to build 42-bed rehab hospital in Port St. Lucie, FL, creating 80 new jobs.
news.summary: In Enola, Pennsylvania on February 18, 2025, healthcare giant PAM Health revealed intentions to construct a 42-bed hospital specializing in physical medicine and rehabilitation in Port St. Lucie, Florida. This development is expected to generate around 80 new employment opportunities, encompassing roles for medical practitioners and support staff.

news.headline: Live Nation Urban invests in Breakr through Black Lily Capital to support early-stage companies with Black founders in music.
news.summary: A new fund called Black Lily Capital is set to invest in early-stage companies in the music industry founded by black entrepreneurs. The investment, led by Live Nation Urban, was announced on February 18, 2025. This fund's focus is on supporting startups in the music space, particularly those with black founders. The exact amount of the investment was not disclosed, but it aims to provide crucial funding and resources to emerging businesses in this sector. This initiative represents an important step towards promoting diversity and inclusion within the music industry.

news.headline: Investors in TELUS International (Cda) Inc. (NYSE: TIXT) urged to contact Levi & Korsinsky before March 31, 2025 regarding class action securities lawsuit.
news.summary: In New York on February 18, 2025, Levi & Korsinsky, LLP informed investors in TELUS International (Cda) Inc. ("TELUS International" or the "Company") (NYSE: TIXT) about a class action securities lawsuit. The class action lawsuit aims to recoup losses for TELUS International shareholders.

news.headline: Shareholders of IIPR urged to contact Levi & Korsinsky by March 18, 2025 for class action lawsuit, NY, Feb 18 - details on PR Newswire.
news.summary: A legal notice has been issued by Levi & Korsinsky, LLP on Feb. 18, 2025, to inform investors holding shares of Innovative Industrial Properties, Inc. ("Innovative Industrial Properties" or "the Company") (NYSE: IIPR) regarding a class action securities lawsuit. The lawsuit aims to recoup losses for investors who meet the class definition. The defendants are accused of engaging in actions that have negatively impacted the company's stock performance. Further details on the lawsuit and the specific losses being addressed are available for affected investors to review and potentially join the legal action.

news.headline: Investors in Cardlytics (NASDAQ: CDLX) should contact Levi & Korsinsky by March 25, 2025 regarding a class action lawsuit.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, in New York, Levi & Korsinsky, LLP announced that investors in Cardlytics, Inc. (NASDAQ: CDLX) have been notified about a class action securities lawsuit. The lawsuit is specifically aimed at recovering losses for Cardlytics investors who were impacted by the aforementioned case.

news.headline: Sapiens reports Q4 2024 financial results, ended Dec 31. Provider of insurance software.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, Rochelle Park, New Jersey - Sapiens International Corporation, listed on NASDAQ as SPNS and on TASE as SPNS, disclosed its financial performance for the quarter concluding on December 31, 2024. As a prominent software solutions provider for insurance firms worldwide, the company unveiled its fourth-quarter results.

news.headline: Shareholders of Caribou Biosciences, Inc. urged to contact Levi & Korsinsky by Feb. 24, 2025 for class action securities lawsuit - NASDAQ: CRBU.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, an announcement was made by Levi & Korsinsky, LLP regarding a class action securities lawsuit involving Caribou Biosciences, Inc. (NASDAQ: CRBU). This lawsuit aims to recover losses for investors of the Company. The class definition includes all those who suffered losses due to their investment in Caribou Biosciences, Inc.

news.headline: Block, Inc. shareholders urged to contact Levi & Korsinsky by March 18, 2025 regarding class action lawsuit - XYZ.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, Levi & Korsinsky, LLP announced a class action securities lawsuit against Block, Inc. ("Block" or the "Company") listed on NYSE as XYZ. The lawsuit aims to assist investors who suffered losses due to alleged misconduct by the company. Investors who were negatively impacted by this situation are encouraged to participate in the lawsuit for potential recovery. The class action lawsuit seeks to provide recourse to affected Block investors during the specified period.

ams OSRAM introduces two new sensor modules to enhance CT technology, supporting various clinical applications.
news.summary: A global leader in intelligent sensors and emitters, ams OSRAM, has showcased its dedication to Computed Tomography (CT) by introducing two new sensor modules. These modules, crucial for diagnostic imaging technology, cater to a range of clinical uses such as oncology and cardiovascular treatment. Ensuring accuracy in patient outcomes and facilitating early detection, the CT sensor modules signify ams OSRAM's commitment to enhancing medical imaging technology. The company's recent advancements in this field aim to provide cutting-edge solutions for improving healthcare services.

news.headline: Latest AI model Grok-3 surpasses competitors in benchmark test, registering record-breaking score in blind evaluation.
news.summary: In a recent blind AI evaluation, the newest AI model called Grok-3 from xAI surpassed competitors such as ChatGPT, Gemini, and DeepSeek. Grok-3 achieved a remarkable score, setting a new record in the evaluation.

news.headline: Biotech company Shift Bioscience establishes North American team in Toronto to advance AI-powered virtual cell technology for age-related diseases.
news.summary: Shift Bioscience, a biotech firm leveraging AI technology in combating age-related diseases, has revealed the creation of a new North American team and facilities. This initiative is aimed at accelerating the progress of the Company’s platform for identifying rejuvenation gene targets. The Toronto-based team, led by Lucas Camillo as Head of Machine Learning and advised by Professor Bo Wang, will drive these efforts forward. This move comes as part of the company's expansion into the AI hub, showcasing its commitment to innovation and growth in the field.

Bitcoin may see an August 2023 breakdown with $85K potential, based on analysis anticipating a repeat of 2023 patterns.
news.summary: According to new research, the price of Bitcoin (BTC) is currently showing no clear trend. However, analysts suggest that if Bitcoin were to repeat its past performance from 2023, there is a possibility of its value reaching $85,000.

news.headline: BoE Gov. Bailey: Bond term premia are being moved by US comments on tariffs.
Trend Micro's Q4 and FY2024 results: $1.3B total enterprise ARR, +10% net sales growth, 18% operating margin, $273M in next-gen AI SOC ARR. CEO: focuses on customer value, proactive security.
news.summary: Trend Micro Incorporated reported impressive earnings for Q4 and fiscal year 2024, with a 10% increase in global net sales at actual currency, pushing the enterprise ARR to over US $1.3 billion. Next-gen AI security operations center (SOC) annual recurring revenue (ARR) increased by 21% to over US $273 million. Additionally, there was a 24% increase in pre-GAAP commercial revenue globally at constant currency in Q4. Operating income also surged by 48%, improving the operating margin to 18% in 2024. CEO Eva Chen attributed the success to the enterprise cybersecurity platform, emphasizing its value in proactively addressing cyber threats. The platform's attachment rate rose by 40% in Q4, underlining its significance in preventing attacks.

news.headline: BoE Gov. Bailey: We haven't seen anything in latest labour data that fundamentally changes our view on the outlook.
Trump's tax cut plan criticized by Robert Reich for adding $4.6T to deficit; Top 100 firms will get $48B relief.
news.summary: Former U.S. Secretary of Labor Robert Reich criticized the tax reduction plans of the Trump administration in a post, warning that the proposed cuts for wealthy individuals and lower corporate tax rates could increase the deficit by $4.6 trillion. The potential tax cuts, including reducing the corporate tax rate to 15%, are estimated to save companies billions, with the top 100 U.S. companies expected to receive a total tax cut of $48 billion despite earning $1.1 trillion in profits in 2023. The proposed measures may also widen the U.S. trade deficit, potentially funded by tariffs on trading partners.

Polymarket introduces 2 prediction markets amid calls for Fort Knox audit amid debates on gold reserves.
news.summary: Polymarket recently introduced two interconnected prediction markets amid increasing pressure on US President Donald Trump to initiate an audit of the gold reserves held at Fort Knox. The markets are set up to gauge the likelihood of such an audit taking place, with participants able to bet on the outcome. This move by Polymarket comes at a time when there is a growing focus on the issue, indicating significant interest and concern among the public. It remains to be seen how these prediction markets will influence the discussion surrounding the audit of Fort Knox's gold reserves.

news.headline: Dow falls 150+ points but records weekly gains; Fear & Greed index improves - Dow up 0.6%, S&P 500 1.5%, Nasdaq 2.6%
news.summary: The CNN Money Fear and Greed index displayed some improvement in market sentiment, shifting to the “Fear” zone on Friday. U.S. stocks closed mixed, with the Dow Jones falling over 150 points intra-day. The S&P 500 saw a 1.5% increase last week, and the Dow climbed 0.6%, while the Nasdaq surged by 2.6%. Traders analyzed disappointing retail sales data and the potential for peace talks between Russia and Ukraine. U.S. retail sales dropped by 0.9% in January, well below the expected 0.1% decrease. SoundHound AI Inc. (NASDAQ:SOUN) shares experienced a decline. Read the full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Several companies set to report Q4 earnings:- Expeditors Intl (NYSE:EXP) $1.44/share, $2.81B revenue- Franklin Electric (NASDAQ:FELE) $0.66/share, $465.87M revenue- Valmont Industries (NYSE:VMI) $3.62/share, $1.01B revenue- Watsco (NYSE:WSO) $2.19/share, $1.67B revenue- Baidu (NASDAQ:BIDU) $1.78/share, $4.56B revenueCompanies to report after the bell:- James Hardie Industries (NYSE:JHX) $0.36/share, $960.80M revenue- RB Global (NYSE:RBA) $0.79/share, $1.06B revenue
news.summary: Several companies are set to report earnings before and after the bell. Before the bell, companies like Expeditors Intl (NYSE: EXPD) are projected to report quarterly earnings at $1.44 per share on revenue of $2.81 billion, while companies like Baidu (NASDAQ: BIDU) are expected to report quarterly earnings at $1.78 per share on revenue of $4.56 billion. After the bell, James Hardie Industries (NYSE: JHX) is expected to report quarterly earnings at $0.36 per share on revenue of $960.80 million, and RB Global (NYSE: RBA) is projected to report quarterly earnings at $0.79 per share on revenue of $1.06 billion. Other companies like Medtronic (NYSE: MDT) are projected to report quarterly earnings at $1.36 per share on revenue of $8.33 billion. Overall, a mix of positive and negative earnings expectations are anticipated for these companies based on revenue and share projections.

news.headline: ZEW: The recent move by the ECB to cut interest rates in response to sluggish economic activity in the monetary union is likely to have contributed to the better outlook for the construction industry.
Communities, businesses, and NGOs collaborate to address water challenges. 2.2 billion lack safe water, volunteers worldwide mobilize for World Water Day 2025.
news.summary: In Washington, a global initiative called #LetsSolveWater is gaining momentum as 2.2 billion people face water scarcity. Various stakeholders, including communities, businesses, and NGOs, are coming together to address this pressing issue on World Water Day. Between March 17 and 22, thousands of volunteers worldwide will participate in activities aimed at enhancing water security. These initiatives will include cleanups, educational programs, and projects focused on improving access to safe water, sanitation, and hygiene (WASH). The collective goal is to make tangible advancements in providing clean water and sanitation for communities worldwide through volunteer-driven efforts.

Aurora Mobile integrates DeepSeek into JPush to enhance push services, offering smarter notifications - Feb 18, 2025.
news.summary: In Shenzhen, China on February 18, 2025, Aurora Mobile Limited (NASDAQ: JG) shared that their key product, JPush, has effectively incorporated DeepSeek, a top-tier large language model (LLM) recognized for its streamlined design and specialized enhancements. This advancement highlights a pivotal moment in JPush’s progress, empowering developers to provide more intelligent, personalized, and efficient push notifications to their audience.
